title: Hell Hath No Fury cannot be negated when played

card.rawText: Play this card from your hand when your opponent plays a Lightning card. Take away 1/2 of the remaining HP of their primary creature. This card cannot be negated.

plan.title: Hell Hath No Fury cannot be negated when played
plan.summary: Respond to an opponent Lightning card with Hell Hath No Fury and verify its cannot-be-negated flag suppresses negation.

notes: Player_1 responds from hand with Hell Hath No Fury, which cannot be negated.

steps: Player_1 plays Hell Hath No Fury from hand in response.
Verify Hell Hath No Fury cannot be negated while resolving.

expectedAssertions.label: Hell Hath No Fury was not negated
No negation response was added against Hell Hath No Fury

manualVerification: The card still has to be played only in response to an opponent Lightning card.
riskNotes: This fixture checks the negation rule, while 054-E02 checks the HP reduction.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_054_hell_hath_no_fury-054-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
